search_document:
User Request: Suppliers by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Suppliers by Country
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
Title: Top Supplier Countries
Type: table
Description: Countries with the highest number of suppliers
Title: Total Suppliers
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of suppliers

sql_queries.title: Suppliers by Country
sql_queries.description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(SupplierID) AS SupplierCount FROM Suppliers GROUP BY Country

sql_queries.title: Top Supplier Countries
sql_queries.description: Countries with the highest number of suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(SupplierID) AS SupplierCount FROM Suppliers GROUP BY Country ORDER BY SupplierCount DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(SupplierID) AS TotalSuppliers FROM Suppliers
